meta.name: Saikat Bandyopadhyay
meta.title: Full-Stack Biomedical Data Scientist & Clinical Pipeline Architect
meta.tagline: Decoding the language of life to end human suffering

about.bio: Computational biologist with 7+ years of experience shipping production-grade bioinformatics pipelines across multi-modal data streams — NGS, GWAS, eQTL, RNA-seq, single-cell, and clinical imaging. Coauthored 3 peer-reviewed papers including JCI Insight 2025. Built a causal-gene-discovery pipeline at UVA that identified 10+ validation-ready targets — selected as Reviewer's Choice Abstract at ASHG 2025; architected FAIR data-governance frameworks for large-scale causal inference modeling.

highlights.label: Production-Grade
highlights.value: Scalable software design with CI/CD discipline, containerized deployments, and data security built in from day one

highlights.label: Audit-Ready
highlights.value: Traceable, fault-tolerant systems for highly regulated environments — CLIA/CAP, HIPAA/SOC 2, healthcare, and industrial compliance

highlights.label: Data Security
highlights.value: PII-blind architectures, split-key encryption, and privacy-preserving inference pipelines for sensitive clinical and genomic data

highlights.label: Deep Learning
highlights.value: Statistical modeling, mathematical simulation, and neural networks — from Bayesian causal inference to real-time medical image classification

projects.title: RAPID-CT: AI-Powered Brain Hemorrhage Detection
projects.description: Deep learning framework detecting Intracranial Hemorrhage from brain CT scans using segmentation-based ResNet architecture. Engineered a PII-blind REST API with split-key encryption for clinical deployment — because no patient should wait for a diagnosis while their data waits for permission.
projects.outcome: Produced 98% accuracy in radiologist-based validation and reduced per-case processing time by 60% via clinical-grade AI inference pipeline

projects.title: Causal Gene Discovery Pipeline
projects.description: Computational colocalization pipeline integrating GWAS and bulk RNA-seq eQTL data to identify candidate causal genes in Diversity Outbred mice. Implemented conditional analysis with bootstrapping to validate concordance between conditional and colocalization signals.
projects.outcome: Identified a novel lncRNA and 2 protein-coding genes providing mechanistic interpretation of BMD-GWAS loci — selected as Reviewer's Choice Abstract at ASHG 2025

projects.title: Proteogenomics: Beyond the Reference Genome
projects.description: Nextflow-based pipeline integrating long-read RNA sequencing with mass spectrometry to discover novel transcript isoforms and protein products absent from GENCODE annotations. Rewriting what we thought we knew about the proteome.
projects.outcome: Identified novel isoforms absent from GENCODE by integrating 2 modalities (RNA-seq + targeted mass spectrometry) — published in JASMS 2024

projects.title: Single-Cell Trajectory Analysis of Bone Marrow
projects.description: Pseudotime trajectory analysis on single-cell RNA-seq data characterizing gene expression dynamics along osteoblast and osteoclast differentiation in bone marrow stromal cells — mapping the molecular choreography of bone formation.
projects.outcome: Identified 5 novel genes likely important for osteoblast and osteoclast differentiation from BMSC scRNA-seq data

projects.title: Low-Pass WGS Processing Pipeline
projects.description: High-throughput processing pipeline for Low-Pass Whole Genome Sequencing achieving 15% reduction in genotyping costs while maintaining fidelity for downstream haplotype calling and eQTL analysis.
projects.outcome: Cut mouse genotyping costs 15% while preserving 98% accuracy in genotype calls for downstream haplotype calling and eQTL analysis

projects.title: FAIR Data Governance Framework
projects.description: Architected a standardized data governance framework enforcing FAIR principles across all research data assets — transforming chaos into a reproducible, audit-ready ecosystem.
projects.outcome: Standardized FAIR data-governance for shared NGS infrastructure across 5+ concurrent projects via automated metadata, provenance tracking, and CI/CD

experience.company: University of Virginia — Dept. of Genome Sciences
bullets: Built a colocalization pipeline integrating Diversity-Outbred mouse GWAS with bulk RNA-seq eQTL data; designed qPCR experimental validation of loci, identifying a novel lncRNA and 2 protein-coding genes and providing a mechanistic interpretation of BMD-GWAS loci — selected as Reviewer's Choice Abstract at ASHG 2025
Identified 10+ validation-ready bone cell-type-specific (osteoblast, osteoclast) key driver genes through integration of bulk RNA-seq deconvolution and WGCNA
Performed Slingshot pseudotime trajectory analysis on scRNA-seq data generated on BMSC to identify 5 novel genes likely important for osteoblast and osteoclast differentiation

experience.company: University of Virginia — Dept. of Genome Sciences
bullets: Mentored a BioLab exchange student from Poland in a project building a high-throughput Low-Pass WGS pipeline for haplotype calling and eQTL analysis, cutting mouse genotyping costs 15% while preserving 98% accuracy in genotype calls
Deployed a Nextflow Long-Read Proteogenomics pipeline integrating 2 modalities (RNA-seq + targeted mass spectrometry), identifying novel isoforms absent from GENCODE (Korchak et al., JASMS 2024)
Designed FAIR data-governance standards for shared NGS infrastructure across 5+ concurrent projects through automated metadata and provenance tracking along with a version-controlled CI/CD pipeline

Delivered a sequence QC module for the Clinical Genomics Workspace, written with Python and WDL using the Illumina DRAGEN platform, processing 200–1,000 patient samples per week and supporting customer retention for the assay-productization team

experience.company: CSIR — Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology (IGIB)
bullets: Led the architecture design of RAPID-CT, a radiology image classification system built on a ResNet-backbone deep-learning framework for intracranial hemorrhage detection from brain CT scans that produced 98% accuracy in radiologist-based validation and reduced per-case processing time by 60%
Engineered a PII-blind REST API with a 2-key split-encryption scheme, resolving a critical privacy bottleneck for clinical informatics infrastructure
Led the development of ProMetaDB, a semi-automated annotation framework integrating 3 public repositories (PRIDE, JASPAR, iProX) to construct a tissue-specific proteome atlas

publications.title: The septin cytoskeleton is a regulator of intestinal epithelial barrier integrity and mucosal inflammation
IS-PRM-Based Peptide Targeting Informed by Long-Read Sequencing for Alternative Proteome Detection
publications.journal: Journal of the American Society for Mass Spectrometry

publications.title: Application of Computer Assisted Bimolecular Interaction Modelling in Predictive Microbiology

Precision Health Initiative Trainee Stipend — University of Virginia, 2025
